findings.message: The spread `...(process.env.CI ? { workers: 1 } : {})` is a valid exactOptionalPropertyTypes workaround but adds cognitive overhead. A cleaner alternative is defining a typed config object first and conditionally assigning workers before passing to defineConfig. No functional issue.

E2E tests live in app/e2e/ which matches the CLAUDE.md folder convention. No layer boundary violations — tests import only @playwright/test and @axe-core/playwright (external testing tools), never server or component internals. Architecture is correct.
